name: OpenWebUI Knowledge Manager
description: Manage OpenWebUI knowledge collections and RAG files — create collections, upload documents, ingest web pages, and organize knowledge bases

credentials_required.label: OpenWebUI URL
credentials_required.hint: Base URL of your OpenWebUI instance, e.g. https://webui.example.com

credentials_required.label: OpenWebUI API Key
credentials_required.hint: Settings > Account > API Keys in OpenWebUI

tools.name: get_knowledge
tools.description: Get details and files of a knowledge collection

tools.name: update_knowledge
tools.description: Update name or description of a knowledge collection

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file from a URL into a knowledge collection

tools.name: ingest_web_url
tools.description: Process a web page URL into a knowledge collection

tools.name: remove_file
tools.description: Remove and delete a file from a knowledge collection

author: freddy-schuetz
